Looking at the comment `# (1000 + 500) bytes = 1.46484375 MB`—that conversion doesn't work mathematically. But if those values are actually in KB instead: 1500 KB = 1.46484375 MB. That matches perfectly. The test must be treating the input sizes as kilobytes, not bytes.

name: Artifact Cleanup Script Tests

on:
  push:
    branches:

      - master
    paths:

      - '.github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml'

    branches:

      - master
    paths:
      - 'Remove-Artifacts.ps1'
      - 'Remove-Artifacts.tests.ps1'
      - '.github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  validate-workflow:
    name: Validate Workflow with actionlint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Validate workflow YAML
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if ! command -v actionlint &> /dev/null; then
            echo "actionlint not found, installing..."
            sudo apt-get update
            sudo apt-get install -y golang-go
            go install github.com/rhysd/actionlint/cmd/actionlint@latest
            export PATH="$PATH:$(go env GOPATH)/bin"
          fi
          actionlint .github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml

  test:
    name: Run Pester Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: validate-workflow
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester Tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Write-Host "Running Pester tests..."
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path Remove-Artifacts.tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru

          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) {
            Write-Host "Tests failed!" -ForegroundColor Red
            exit 1
          }

          Write-Host "All tests passed!" -ForegroundColor Green
          exit 0

    name: Verify Script Files
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:

        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Verify Remove-Artifacts.ps1 exists
        shell: bash
        run: test -f Remove-Artifacts.ps1 || exit 1

      - name: Verify Remove-Artifacts.tests.ps1 exists
        shell: bash
        run: test -f Remove-Artifacts.tests.ps1 || exit 1

      - name: Verify workflow file
        shell: bash
        run: test -f .github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml || exit 1

  summary:
    name: Test Summary
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [test, verify-files]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Report Job Status
        shell: bash
        run: |

            echo "Job succeeded"
            exit 0
          else
            echo "Job failed"
            exit 1
          fi

      - 'Remove-Artifacts.tests.ps1'
      - '.github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
    paths:
      - 'Remove-Artifacts.ps1'
      - 'Remove-Artifacts.tests.ps1'
      - '.github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  validate-workflow:
    name: Validate Workflow with actionlint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Validate workflow YAML
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if ! command -v actionlint &> /dev/null; then
            echo "actionlint not found, installing..."
            sudo apt-get update
            sudo apt-get install -y golang-go
            go install github.com/rhysd/actionlint/cmd/actionlint@latest
            export PATH="$PATH:$(go env GOPATH)/bin"
          fi
          if actionlint .github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml; then
            echo "Workflow validation passed"
          else
            echo "Workflow validation failed"
            exit 1
          fi

  test:
    name: Run Pester Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: validate-workflow
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester Tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Write-Host "Running Pester tests..."
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path Remove-Artifacts.tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru

          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) {
            Write-Host "Tests failed!" -ForegroundColor Red
            exit 1
          }

          Write-Host "All tests passed!" -ForegroundColor Green
          exit 0

  verify-files:
    name: Verify Script Files
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Verify Remove-Artifacts.ps1 exists
        shell: bash
        run: test -f Remove-Artifacts.ps1 || exit 1

      - name: Verify Remove-Artifacts.tests.ps1 exists
        shell: bash
        run: test -f Remove-Artifacts.tests.ps1 || exit 1

      - name: Verify workflow file
        shell: bash
        run: test -f .github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml || exit 1

  summary:
    name: Test Summary
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [test, verify-files]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Report Job Status
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [ "${{ needs.test.result }}" == "success" ] && [ "${{ needs.verify-files.result }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "Job succeeded"
            exit 0
          else
            echo "Job failed"
            exit 1
          fi
